title: lyonia latifolia var. calycosa
intro: Lyonia latifolia var. calycosa, also known as Sweet Bay, is a shrub plant species belonging to the family Ericaceae. The plant's leaves and stems possess medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Lyonia latifolia var. calycosa include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
